reviews.review_description: Hi! So this review may not be seen by the owner or anyone but i wanna say something..Thank you Super, Thank you for all the memories on this game, From checking out updates to trying out the mod menus i had a really good time! But now this game is empty..Gorilla paws still tapping and mod menus still clicking in the distence, Although there is a brand new SuperTag out there, This one is the OG Gorilla Tag fangame i played, And it was the first one i have ever played! Thank you for the memories i had with this game..Thank you Super, Thank you!
